Explore the design reference files added by the user to understand the design requirements:

1. Read /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/docs/MMS_STYLE_GUIDE.md - extract all design rules, colors, typography, spacing
2. Read /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/docs/DESIGN_SPEC.md - extract component specifications
3. List and read all files in /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms/MFC/docs/design/* - understand what design assets exist

For each file:
- Summarize the key design requirements
- Note any potential issues or inconsistencies
- Identify what would need to change in the current implementation

Be thorough - the user warned that content may be incorrect and needs evaluation.

1вҶ’# UX Specification: Infinite Canvas for Railway Maintenance Planning 2вҶ’ 3вҶ’## 1. Vision 4вҶ’ 5вҶ’**"Single Pane of Glass"** вҖ” A continuous, zoomable timeline that unifies 12-year strategic planning down to daily operations without page reloads or tab navigation. 6вҶ’ 7вҶ’**Core Metaphor:** Google Earth for time. Pan through years, zoom into days. Data transforms semantically at each level. 8вҶ’ 9вҶ’--- 10вҶ’ 11вҶ’## 2. Architecture Overview 12вҶ’ 13вҶ’``` 14вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 15вҶ’в”Ӯ React Application в”Ӯ 16вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 17вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ 18вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Viewport в”Ӯ в”Ӯ @use-gesture в”Ӯ в”Ӯ @mms/toolkit в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 19вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ State в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Ө Input Handler в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Ө State Machine в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 20вҶ’в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ 21вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 22вҶ’в”Ӯ LOD Decision Layer в”Ӯ 23вҶ’в”Ӯ zoom < 0.5 вҶ’ MACRO в”Ӯ 0.5-2.0 вҶ’ MESO в”Ӯ > 2.0 вҶ’ MICRO в”Ӯ 24вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 25вҶ’в”Ӯ HeatmapLayer в”Ӯ ScatterplotLayer в”Ӯ PolygonLayer + HTML в”Ӯ 26вҶ’в”Ӯ (aggregated) в”Ӯ (instanced) в”Ӯ (detailed cards) в”Ӯ 27вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 28вҶ’в”Ӯ RBush Spatial Index (60,000+ tasks) в”Ӯ 29вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 30вҶ’в”Ӯ deck.gl OrthographicView + WebGL2 Renderer в”Ӯ 31вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ 32вҶ’``` 33вҶ’ 34вҶ’### Tech Stack 35вҶ’ 36вҶ’| Layer | Technology | Purpose | 37вҶ’|-----------|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------| 38вҶ’| Rendering | **deck.gl** + OrthographicView | WebGL2 canvas with GPU instancing | 39вҶ’| Input | **@use-gesture/react** | Cross-platform pan/zoom/pinch | 40вҶ’| Spatial | **RBush** | O(log n) viewport culling | 41вҶ’| State | **@mms/toolkit** | Reactive state machine | 42вҶ’| UI | **BlueprintJS 6** | Navbar, cards, controls | 43вҶ’ 44вҶ’--- 45вҶ’ 46вҶ’## 3. Coordinate System 47вҶ’ 48вҶ’The canvas uses a 2D orthographic coordinate system: 49вҶ’ 50вҶ’| Axis | Represents | Unit | Example | 51вҶ’|-------|-------------|------------------|---------------------| 52вҶ’| **X** | Time | Days since epoch | Day 0 = Jan 1, 2024 | 53вҶ’| **Y** | Train index | Row number | Train 0-49 | 54вҶ’ 55вҶ’```typescript 56вҶ’// World coordinates 57вҶ’const PX_PER_DAY = 10; // 1 day = 10 pixels 58вҶ’const PX_PER_TRAIN = 24; // 1 train row = 24 pixels 59вҶ’ 60вҶ’// Convert screen to world 61вҶ’function screenToWorld(screenX: number, screenY: number, viewport: Viewport) { 62вҶ’ return { 63вҶ’ day: (screenX - viewport.x) / (PX_PER_DAY * viewport.zoom), 64вҶ’ trainIndex: (screenY - viewport.y) / (PX_PER_TRAIN * viewport.zoom) 65вҶ’ }; 66вҶ’} 67вҶ’``` 68вҶ’ 69вҶ’--- 70вҶ’ 71вҶ’## 4. Semantic Zoom (LOD Layers) 72вҶ’ 73вҶ’### 4.1 Level of Detail Thresholds 74вҶ’ 75вҶ’| LOD | Zoom Range | Time Visible | Visualization | 76вҶ’|-----------|-------------|--------------|-------------------------------| 77вҶ’| **MACRO** | < 0.5x | 10-20 years | Aggregated heatmap | 78вҶ’| **MESO** | 0.5x - 2.0x | 2-5 years | Task blocks (DNA pattern) | 79вҶ’| **MICRO** | > 2.0x | 4-8 weeks | Detailed cards + dependencies | 80вҶ’ 81вҶ’### 4.2 Layer Implementation 82вҶ’ 83вҶ’```typescript 84вҶ’// deck.gl CompositeLayer with LOD switching 85вҶ’class MaintenanceLayer extends CompositeLayer { 86вҶ’ renderLayers() { 87вҶ’ const { zoom } = this.context.viewport; 88вҶ’ 89вҶ’ return [ 90вҶ’ new HeatmapLayer({ 91вҶ’ id: 'macro', 92вҶ’ visible: zoom < 0.5, 93вҶ’ data: this.props.aggregatedData, 94вҶ’ getPosition: d => [d.dayCenter, d.trainCenter], 95вҶ’ getWeight: d => d.taskCount, 96вҶ’ colorRange: HEATMAP_COLORS // Yellow вҶ’ Orange вҶ’ Red 97вҶ’ }), 98вҶ’ 99вҶ’ new ScatterplotLayer({ 100вҶ’ id: 'meso', 101вҶ’ visible: zoom >= 0.5 && zoom < 2.0, 102вҶ’ data: this.props.tasks, 103вҶ’ getPosition: d => [d.startDay * PX_PER_DAY, d.trainIndex * PX_PER_TRAIN], 104вҶ’ getRadius: d => d.duration * PX_PER_DAY / 2, 105вҶ’ getFillColor: d => TASK_COLORS[d.type] 106вҶ’ }), 107вҶ’ 108вҶ’ new PolygonLayer({ 109вҶ’ id: 'micro', 110вҶ’ visible: zoom >= 2.0, 111вҶ’ data: this.props.visibleTasks, 112вҶ’ getPolygon: d => getTaskPolygon(d), 113вҶ’ getFillColor: d => TASK_COLORS[d.type], 114вҶ’ pickable: true 115вҶ’ }) 116вҶ’ ]; 117вҶ’ } 118вҶ’} 119вҶ’``` 120вҶ’ 121вҶ’### 4.3 Crossfade Transitions 122вҶ’ 123вҶ’To avoid jarring "pop-in" when switching LOD levels, both layers render simultaneously during transition with opacity crossfade: 124вҶ’ 125вҶ’```typescript 126вҶ’const TRANSITION_WIDTH = 0.1; // Zoom units 127вҶ’ 128вҶ’function calculateOpacity(zoom: number, threshold: number, direction: 'in' | 'out') { 129вҶ’ const t = (zoom - threshold) / TRANSITION_WIDTH; 130вҶ’ const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t)); 131вҶ’ return direction === 'in' ? clamped : 1 - clamped; 132вҶ’} 133вҶ’ 134вҶ’// At zoom 0.45: MACRO 100%, MESO 0% 135вҶ’// At zoom 0.50: MACRO 50%, MESO 50% 136вҶ’// At zoom 0.55: MACRO 0%, MESO 100% 137вҶ’``` 138вҶ’ 139вҶ’--- 140вҶ’ 141вҶ’## 5. Viewport Culling 142вҶ’ 143вҶ’### 5.1 RBush Spatial Index 144вҶ’ 145вҶ’Never render off-screen elements. Use R-tree for O(log n) queries: 146вҶ’ 147вҶ’```typescript 148вҶ’import RBush from 'rbush'; 149вҶ’ 150вҶ’const spatialIndex = new RBush(); 151вҶ’ 152вҶ’// Bulk load on data change 153вҶ’spatialIndex.load(tasks.map(task => ({ 154вҶ’ minX: task.startDay * PX_PER_DAY, 155вҶ’ minY: task.trainIndex * PX_PER_TRAIN, 156вҶ’ maxX: (task.startDay + task.duration) * PX_PER_DAY, 157вҶ’ maxY: (task.trainIndex + 1) * PX_PER_TRAIN, 158вҶ’ task 159вҶ’}))); 160вҶ’ 161вҶ’// Query visible tasks with overscan margin 162вҶ’const visible = spatialIndex.search({ 163вҶ’ minX: viewport.left - OVERSCAN, 164вҶ’ minY: viewport.top - OVERSCAN, 165вҶ’ maxX: viewport.right + OVERSCAN, 166вҶ’ maxY: viewport.bottom + OVERSCAN 167вҶ’}); 168вҶ’``` 169вҶ’ 170вҶ’### 5.2 Performance Targets 171вҶ’ 172вҶ’| Metric | Target | Rationale | 173вҶ’|----------------|---------|-----------------------------| 174вҶ’| Viewport query | < 5ms | 1000 results from 60K items | 175вҶ’| Frame time | < 16ms | 60fps constant | 176вҶ’| LOD transition | < 100ms | No perceptible delay | 177вҶ’| Memory | < 100MB | Mobile device support | 178вҶ’ 179вҶ’--- 180вҶ’ 181вҶ’## 6. Input Handling 182вҶ’ 183вҶ’### 6.1 Cross-Platform Normalization 184вҶ’ 185вҶ’Using `@use-gesture/react` for consistent behavior across devices: 186вҶ’ 187вҶ’```typescript 188вҶ’const bind = useGesture({ 189вҶ’ onPinch: ({ offset: [scale], origin: [ox, oy] }) => { 190вҶ’ zoomAtPoint(scale, ox, oy); 191вҶ’ }, 192вҶ’ onWheel: ({ delta: [dx, dy], ctrlKey }) => { 193вҶ’ if (ctrlKey) return; // Handled by onPinch 194вҶ’ pan(-dx, -dy); 195вҶ’ }, 196вҶ’ onDrag: ({ delta: [dx, dy], velocity }) => { 197вҶ’ pan(dx, dy); 198вҶ’ if (velocity > 0.5) startMomentum(velocity); 199вҶ’ } 200вҶ’}, { 201вҶ’ target: canvasRef, 202вҶ’ eventOptions: { passive: false } 203вҶ’}); 204вҶ’``` 205вҶ’ 206вҶ’### 6.2 Gesture Mapping 207вҶ’ 208вҶ’| Input | Device | Action | 209вҶ’|-------------------|----------------|---------------------| 210вҶ’| Drag | All | Pan canvas | 211вҶ’| Scroll wheel | Mouse | Zoom at cursor | 212вҶ’| Two-finger scroll | Trackpad | Pan canvas | 213вҶ’| Pinch | Trackpad/Touch | Zoom at center | 214вҶ’| Ctrl+Scroll | All | Horizontal pan | 215вҶ’| Shift+Scroll | All | Vertical pan | 216вҶ’| Double-click | All | Zoom in 2x at point | 217вҶ’ 218вҶ’### 6.3 Momentum Physics 219вҶ’ 220вҶ’```typescript 221вҶ’const FRICTION = 0.93; 222вҶ’const MIN_VELOCITY = 0.5; 223вҶ’ 224вҶ’function startMomentum(initialVelocity: Vector2) { 225вҶ’ let velocity = initialVelocity; 226вҶ’ 227вҶ’ function animate() { 228вҶ’ velocity = velocity.multiply(FRICTION); 229вҶ’ pan(velocity.x, velocity.y); 230вҶ’ 231вҶ’ if (velocity.magnitude() > MIN_VELOCITY) { 232вҶ’ requestAnimationFrame(animate); 233вҶ’ } 234вҶ’ } 235вҶ’ 236вҶ’ requestAnimationFrame(animate); 237вҶ’} 238вҶ’``` 239вҶ’ 240вҶ’--- 241вҶ’ 242вҶ’## 7. Visual Design 243вҶ’ 244вҶ’### 7.1 Color Palette 245вҶ’ 246вҶ’| Element | Color | Hex | 247вҶ’|-------------------|------------|-----------| 248вҶ’| Background | Zinc 100 | `#f4f4f5` | 249вҶ’| Task: Maintenance | Blue 700 | `#1d4ed8` | 250вҶ’| Task: Overhaul | Amber 500 | `#f59e0b` | 251вҶ’| Task: Inspection | Gray 500 | `#6b7280` | 252вҶ’| Conflict | Red 500 | `#ef4444` | 253вҶ’| Selection | Cyan 500 | `#06b6d4` | 254вҶ’| Focus | Violet 500 | `#8b5cf6` | 255вҶ’ 256вҶ’### 7.2 Heatmap Gradient (MACRO) 257вҶ’ 258вҶ’```typescript 259вҶ’import { interpolateYlOrRd } from 'd3-scale-chromatic'; 260вҶ’ 261вҶ’// Low density вҶ’ High density 262вҶ’// Yellow (#fff3c4) вҶ’ Orange (#fb923c) вҶ’ Red (#dc2626) 263вҶ’const getHeatmapColor = (density: number) => { 264вҶ’ return interpolateYlOrRd(density); // 0.0 to 1.0 265вҶ’}; 266вҶ’``` 267вҶ’ 268вҶ’### 7.3 Typography 269вҶ’ 270вҶ’| Element | Font | Size | 271вҶ’|----------------|-------------------|---------------| 272вҶ’| Task labels | System sans-serif | 11px | 273вҶ’| Timeline dates | System sans-serif | 12px semibold | 274вҶ’| Train IDs | Monospace | 12px | 275вҶ’| Tooltips | System sans-serif | 13px | 276вҶ’ 277вҶ’--- 278вҶ’ 279вҶ’## 8. Layout Structure 280вҶ’ 281вҶ’``` 282вҶ’в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ 283вҶ’в”Ӯ NAVBAR [Zoom: 1.00x] [MESO] [Reset] в”Ӯ 284вҶ’в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 285вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ TIMELINE HEADER (adaptive date labels) в”Ӯ 286вҶ’в”Ӯ SIDEBAR в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө 287вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 288вҶ’в”Ӯ Train в”Ӯ deck.gl DeckGL в”Ӯ 289вҶ’в”Ӯ IDs в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 290вҶ’в”Ӯ (synced в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ 291вҶ’в”Ӯ scroll) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [MACRO] [MESO] [MICRO] Layers в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 292вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ 293вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 294вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [+] Zoom в”Ӯ 295вҶ’в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [MINIMAP] [-] Controls в”Ӯ 296вҶ’в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ 297вҶ’``` 298вҶ’ 299вҶ’### Component Responsibilities 300вҶ’ 301вҶ’| Component | Technology | Function | 302вҶ’|---------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------| 303вҶ’| Navbar | BlueprintJS | Zoom level, LOD badge, reset | 304вҶ’| Sidebar | BlueprintJS Card | Train list, synced with viewport Y | 305вҶ’| Timeline | Custom React | Adaptive date labels (day/week/month/year) | 306вҶ’| Canvas | deck.gl DeckGL | WebGL rendering | 307вҶ’| Minimap | SVG | Bird's eye navigation | 308вҶ’| Zoom Controls | BlueprintJS ButtonGroup | +/- zoom buttons | 309вҶ’ 310вҶ’--- 311вҶ’ 312вҶ’## 9. Interaction States 313вҶ’ 314вҶ’### 9.1 Task States 315вҶ’ 316вҶ’| State | Visual | Trigger | 317вҶ’|----------|-----------------|-------------------| 318вҶ’| Normal | Base color | Default | 319вҶ’| Hover | Brightness +30% | Mouse over | 320вҶ’| Selected | Cyan border | Click | 321вҶ’| Focused | Violet ring | Tab navigation | 322вҶ’| Conflict | Red background | hasConflict: true | 323вҶ’ 324вҶ’### 9.2 Selection Flow 325вҶ’ 326вҶ’``` 327вҶ’Hover (instant) вҶ’ Click (select) вҶ’ Details Panel (slide in) 328вҶ’ вҶ’ Escape (deselect) 329вҶ’``` 330вҶ’ 331вҶ’### 9.3 Keyboard Navigation 332вҶ’ 333вҶ’| Key | Action | 334вҶ’|-------------|---------------------| 335вҶ’| Tab | Focus next task | 336вҶ’| Shift+Tab | Focus previous task | 337вҶ’| Enter/Space | Select focused task | 338вҶ’| Arrow keys | Pan viewport | 339вҶ’| +/- | Zoom in/out | 340вҶ’| Escape | Clear selection | 341вҶ’| Home | Reset view | 342вҶ’ 343вҶ’--- 344вҶ’ 345вҶ’## 10. Accessibility 346вҶ’ 347вҶ’### 10.1 ARIA Implementation 348вҶ’ 349вҶ’```tsx 350вҶ’
355вҶ’ 356вҶ’ 357вҶ’ {/* Live region for announcements */} 358вҶ’
359вҶ’ {announcement} 360вҶ’
361вҶ’
362вҶ’``` 363вҶ’ 364вҶ’### 10.2 Announcements 365вҶ’ 366вҶ’| Event | Announcement | 367вҶ’|-------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------| 368вҶ’| LOD change | "View changed to Strategic heatmap / Tactical blocks / Operational details" | 369вҶ’| Zoom change | "75 percent zoom" (debounced) | 370вҶ’| Task focus | "Maintenance task, Train 15, Day 45, 3 days duration" | 371вҶ’| Selection | "Task selected. Press Escape to deselect." | 372вҶ’ 373вҶ’--- 374вҶ’ 375вҶ’## 11. Data Flow 376вҶ’ 377вҶ’### 11.1 Task Entity 378вҶ’ 379вҶ’```typescript 380вҶ’interface Task { 381вҶ’ id: string; 382вҶ’ trainId: string; 383вҶ’ startDate: string; // ISO 8601 384вҶ’ endDate: string; 385вҶ’ type: 'maintenance' | 'overhaul' | 'inspection'; 386вҶ’ hasConflict: boolean; 387вҶ’} 388вҶ’ 389вҶ’interface TaskRender { 390вҶ’ id: string; 391вҶ’ trainIndex: number; // Y position 392вҶ’ startDay: number; // X position (days since epoch) 393вҶ’ duration: number; // Width in days 394вҶ’ color: [number, number, number, number]; // RGBA 395вҶ’ hasConflict: boolean; 396вҶ’} 397вҶ’``` 398вҶ’ 399вҶ’### 11.2 Viewport State 400вҶ’ 401вҶ’```typescript 402вҶ’interface ViewportState { 403вҶ’ x: number; // Camera X (world units) 404вҶ’ y: number; // Camera Y (world units) 405вҶ’ zoom: number; // 0.1 to 5.0 406вҶ’ lod: 'MACRO' | 'MESO' | 'MICRO'; 407вҶ’} 408вҶ’``` 409вҶ’ 410вҶ’--- 411вҶ’ 412вҶ’## 12. Performance Checklist 413вҶ’ 414вҶ’- [x] deck.gl with GPU instancing (automatic) 415вҶ’- [x] RBush spatial index for O(log n) culling 416вҶ’- [x] Viewport culling with overscan margin 417вҶ’- [x] LOD-based data reduction 418вҶ’- [x] Memoized layer props 419вҶ’- [x] Throttled zoom events (60fps max) 420вҶ’- [x] Crossfade transitions (no pop-in) 421вҶ’- [ ] Web Worker for heavy calculations (future) 422вҶ’- [ ] Progressive loading for large datasets (future) 423вҶ’ 424вҶ’--- 425вҶ’ 426вҶ’## 13. Browser Support 427вҶ’ 428вҶ’| Browser | Support | Notes | 429вҶ’|----------------|---------|----------------------| 430вҶ’| Chrome 90+ | Full | Primary target | 431вҶ’| Safari 15+ | Full | GestureEvent support | 432вҶ’| Firefox 90+ | Full | WebGL2 required | 433вҶ’| Edge 90+ | Full | Chromium-based | 434вҶ’| Mobile Safari | Partial | Touch gestures only | 435вҶ’| Chrome Android | Partial | Touch gestures only | 436вҶ’ 437вҶ’--- 438вҶ’ 439вҶ’## 14. References 440вҶ’ 441вҶ’- [deck.gl Documentation](https://deck.gl/docs) 442вҶ’- [OrthographicView API](https://deck.gl/docs/api-reference/core/orthographic-view) 443вҶ’- [@use-gesture/react](https://use-gesture.netlify.app/) 444вҶ’- [RBush Spatial Index](https://github.com/mourner/rbush) 445вҶ’ Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. # UX Specification: Infinite Canvas for Railway Maintenance Planning ## 1. Vision **"Single Pane of Glass"** вҖ” A continuous, zoomable timeline that unifies 12-year strategic planning down to daily operations without page reloads or tab navigation. **Core Metaphor:** Google Earth for time. Pan through years, zoom into days. Data transforms semantically at each level. --- ## 2. Architecture Overview ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ React Application в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Viewport в”Ӯ в”Ӯ @use-gesture в”Ӯ в”Ӯ @mms/toolkit в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ State в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Ө Input Handler в”Ӯв—„в”Җв”Ө State Machine в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ LOD Decision Layer в”Ӯ в”Ӯ zoom < 0.5 вҶ’ MACRO в”Ӯ 0.5-2.0 вҶ’ MESO в”Ӯ > 2.0 вҶ’ MICRO в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ HeatmapLayer в”Ӯ ScatterplotLayer в”Ӯ PolygonLayer + HTML в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (aggregated) в”Ӯ (instanced) в”Ӯ (detailed cards) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ RBush Spatial Index (60,000+ tasks) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ deck.gl OrthographicView + WebGL2 Renderer в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### Tech Stack | Layer | Technology | Purpose | |-----------|--------------------------------|-----------------------------------| | Rendering | **deck.gl** + OrthographicView | WebGL2 canvas with GPU instancing | | Input | **@use-gesture/react** | Cross-platform pan/zoom/pinch | | Spatial | **RBush** | O(log n) viewport culling | | State | **@mms/toolkit** | Reactive state machine | | UI | **BlueprintJS 6** | Navbar, cards, controls | --- ## 3. Coordinate System The canvas uses a 2D orthographic coordinate system: | Axis | Represents | Unit | Example | |-------|-------------|------------------|---------------------| | **X** | Time | Days since epoch | Day 0 = Jan 1, 2024 | | **Y** | Train index | Row number | Train 0-49 | ```typescript // World coordinates const PX_PER_DAY = 10; // 1 day = 10 pixels const PX_PER_TRAIN = 24; // 1 train row = 24 pixels // Convert screen to world function screenToWorld(screenX: number, screenY: number, viewport: Viewport) { return { day: (screenX - viewport.x) / (PX_PER_DAY * viewport.zoom), trainIndex: (screenY - viewport.y) / (PX_PER_TRAIN * viewport.zoom) }; } ``` --- ## 4. Semantic Zoom (LOD Layers) ### 4.1 Level of Detail Thresholds | LOD | Zoom Range | Time Visible | Visualization | |-----------|-------------|--------------|-------------------------------| | **MACRO** | < 0.5x | 10-20 years | Aggregated heatmap | | **MESO** | 0.5x - 2.0x | 2-5 years | Task blocks (DNA pattern) | | **MICRO** | > 2.0x | 4-8 weeks | Detailed cards + dependencies | ### 4.2 Layer Implementation ```typescript // deck.gl CompositeLayer with LOD switching class MaintenanceLayer extends CompositeLayer { renderLayers() { const { zoom } = this.context.viewport; return [ new HeatmapLayer({ id: 'macro', visible: zoom < 0.5, data: this.props.aggregatedData, getPosition: d => [d.dayCenter, d.trainCenter], getWeight: d => d.taskCount, colorRange: HEATMAP_COLORS // Yellow вҶ’ Orange вҶ’ Red }), new ScatterplotLayer({ id: 'meso', visible: zoom >= 0.5 && zoom < 2.0, data: this.props.tasks, getPosition: d => [d.startDay * PX_PER_DAY, d.trainIndex * PX_PER_TRAIN], getRadius: d => d.duration * PX_PER_DAY / 2, getFillColor: d => TASK_COLORS[d.type] }), new PolygonLayer({ id: 'micro', visible: zoom >= 2.0, data: this.props.visibleTasks, getPolygon: d => getTaskPolygon(d), getFillColor: d => TASK_COLORS[d.type], pickable: true }) ]; } } ``` ### 4.3 Crossfade Transitions To avoid jarring "pop-in" when switching LOD levels, both layers render simultaneously during transition with opacity crossfade: ```typescript const TRANSITION_WIDTH = 0.1; // Zoom units function calculateOpacity(zoom: number, threshold: number, direction: 'in' | 'out') { const t = (zoom - threshold) / TRANSITION_WIDTH; const clamped = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, t)); return direction === 'in' ? clamped : 1 - clamped; } // At zoom 0.45: MACRO 100%, MESO 0% // At zoom 0.50: MACRO 50%, MESO 50% // At zoom 0.55: MACRO 0%, MESO 100% ``` --- ## 5. Viewport Culling ### 5.1 RBush Spatial Index Never render off-screen elements. Use R-tree for O(log n) queries: ```typescript import RBush from 'rbush'; const spatialIndex = new RBush(); // Bulk load on data change spatialIndex.load(tasks.map(task => ({ minX: task.startDay * PX_PER_DAY, minY: task.trainIndex * PX_PER_TRAIN, maxX: (task.startDay + task.duration) * PX_PER_DAY, maxY: (task.trainIndex + 1) * PX_PER_TRAIN, task }))); // Query visible tasks with overscan margin const visible = spatialIndex.search({ minX: viewport.left - OVERSCAN, minY: viewport.top - OVERSCAN, maxX: viewport.right + OVERSCAN, maxY: viewport.bottom + OVERSCAN }); ``` ### 5.2 Performance Targets | Metric | Target | Rationale | |----------------|---------|-----------------------------| | Viewport query | < 5ms | 1000 results from 60K items | | Frame time | < 16ms | 60fps constant | | LOD transition | < 100ms | No perceptible delay | | Memory | < 100MB | Mobile device support | --- ## 6. Input Handling ### 6.1 Cross-Platform Normalization Using `@use-gesture/react` for consistent behavior across devices: ```typescript const bind = useGesture({ onPinch: ({ offset: [scale], origin: [ox, oy] }) => { zoomAtPoint(scale, ox, oy); }, onWheel: ({ delta: [dx, dy], ctrlKey }) => { if (ctrlKey) return; // Handled by onPinch pan(-dx, -dy); }, onDrag: ({ delta: [dx, dy], velocity }) => { pan(dx, dy); if (velocity > 0.5) startMomentum(velocity); } }, { target: canvasRef, eventOptions: { passive: false } }); ``` ### 6.2 Gesture Mapping | Input | Device | Action | |-------------------|----------------|---------------------| | Drag | All | Pan canvas | | Scroll wheel | Mouse | Zoom at cursor | | Two-finger scroll | Trackpad | Pan canvas | | Pinch | Trackpad/Touch | Zoom at center | | Ctrl+Scroll | All | Horizontal pan | | Shift+Scroll | All | Vertical pan | | Double-click | All | Zoom in 2x at point | ### 6.3 Momentum Physics ```typescript const FRICTION = 0.93; const MIN_VELOCITY = 0.5; function startMomentum(initialVelocity: Vector2) { let velocity = initialVelocity; function animate() { velocity = velocity.multiply(FRICTION); pan(velocity.x, velocity.y); if (velocity.magnitude() > MIN_VELOCITY) { requestAnimationFrame(animate); } } requestAnimationFrame(animate); } ``` --- ## 7. Visual Design ### 7.1 Color Palette | Element | Color | Hex | |-------------------|------------|-----------| | Background | Zinc 100 | `#f4f4f5` | | Task: Maintenance | Blue 700 | `#1d4ed8` | | Task: Overhaul | Amber 500 | `#f59e0b` | | Task: Inspection | Gray 500 | `#6b7280` | | Conflict | Red 500 | `#ef4444` | | Selection | Cyan 500 | `#06b6d4` | | Focus | Violet 500 | `#8b5cf6` | ### 7.2 Heatmap Gradient (MACRO) ```typescript import { interpolateYlOrRd } from 'd3-scale-chromatic'; // Low density вҶ’ High density // Yellow (#fff3c4) вҶ’ Orange (#fb923c) вҶ’ Red (#dc2626) const getHeatmapColor = (density: number) => { return interpolateYlOrRd(density); // 0.0 to 1.0 }; ``` ### 7.3 Typography | Element | Font | Size | |----------------|-------------------|---------------| | Task labels | System sans-serif | 11px | | Timeline dates | System sans-serif | 12px semibold | | Train IDs | Monospace | 12px | | Tooltips | System sans-serif | 13px | --- ## 8. Layout Structure ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ NAVBAR [Zoom: 1.00x] [MESO] [Reset] в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ TIMELINE HEADER (adaptive date labels) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ SIDEBAR в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Train в”Ӯ deck.gl DeckGL в”Ӯ в”Ӯ IDs в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (synced в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ scroll) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [MACRO] [MESO] [MICRO] Layers в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [+] Zoom в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [MINIMAP] [-] Controls в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### Component Responsibilities | Component | Technology | Function | |---------------|-------------------------|--------------------------------------------| | Navbar | BlueprintJS | Zoom level, LOD badge, reset | | Sidebar | BlueprintJS Card | Train list, synced with viewport Y | | Timeline | Custom React | Adaptive date labels (day/week/month/year) | | Canvas | deck.gl DeckGL | WebGL rendering | | Minimap | SVG | Bird's eye navigation | | Zoom Controls | BlueprintJS ButtonGroup | +/- zoom buttons | --- ## 9. Interaction States ### 9.1 Task States | State | Visual | Trigger | |----------|-----------------|-------------------| | Normal | Base color | Default | | Hover | Brightness +30% | Mouse over | | Selected | Cyan border | Click | | Focused | Violet ring | Tab navigation | | Conflict | Red background | hasConflict: true | ### 9.2 Selection Flow ``` Hover (instant) вҶ’ Click (select) вҶ’ Details Panel (slide in) вҶ’ Escape (deselect) ``` ### 9.3 Keyboard Navigation | Key | Action | |-------------|---------------------| | Tab | Focus next task | | Shift+Tab | Focus previous task | | Enter/Space | Select focused task | | Arrow keys | Pan viewport | | +/- | Zoom in/out | | Escape | Clear selection | | Home | Reset view | --- ## 10. Accessibility ### 10.1 ARIA Implementation ```tsx
{/* Live region for announcements */}
{announcement}
``` ### 10.2 Announcements | Event | Announcement | |-------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------| | LOD change | "View changed to Strategic heatmap / Tactical blocks / Operational details" | | Zoom change | "75 percent zoom" (debounced) | | Task focus | "Maintenance task, Train 15, Day 45, 3 days duration" | | Selection | "Task selected. Press Escape to deselect." | --- ## 11. Data Flow ### 11.1 Task Entity ```typescript interface Task { id: string; trainId: string; startDate: string; // ISO 8601 endDate: string; type: 'maintenance' | 'overhaul' | 'inspection'; hasConflict: boolean; } interface TaskRender { id: string; trainIndex: number; // Y position startDay: number; // X position (days since epoch) duration: number; // Width in days color: [number, number, number, number]; // RGBA hasConflict: boolean; } ``` ### 11.2 Viewport State ```typescript interface ViewportState { x: number; // Camera X (world units) y: number; // Camera Y (world units) zoom: number; // 0.1 to 5.0 lod: 'MACRO' | 'MESO' | 'MICRO'; } ``` --- ## 12. Performance Checklist - [x] deck.gl with GPU instancing (automatic) - [x] RBush spatial index for O(log n) culling - [x] Viewport culling with overscan margin - [x] LOD-based data reduction - [x] Memoized layer props - [x] Throttled zoom events (60fps max) - [x] Crossfade transitions (no pop-in) - [ ] Web Worker for heavy calculations (future) - [ ] Progressive loading for large datasets (future) --- ## 13. Browser Support | Browser | Support | Notes | |----------------|---------|----------------------| | Chrome 90+ | Full | Primary target | | Safari 15+ | Full | GestureEvent support | | Firefox 90+ | Full | WebGL2 required | | Edge 90+ | Full | Chromium-based | | Mobile Safari | Partial | Touch gestures only | | Chrome Android | Partial | Touch gestures only | --- ## 14. References - [deck.gl Documentation](https://deck.gl/docs) - [OrthographicView API](https://deck.gl/docs/api-reference/core/orthographic-view) - [@use-gesture/react](https://use-gesture.netlify.app/) - [RBush Spatial Index](https://github.com/mourner/rbush)

Executive Summary 22вҶ’ 23вҶ’This document establishes the visual identity, interaction patterns, and technical architecture for the MMS Fractal Canvas interface. The system enables maintenance planners to navigate seamlessly from 12-year strategic views to shift-level execution through semantic zoomвҖ”similar to Google Maps but for time-based maintenance planning. 24вҶ’ 25вҶ’**Core Constraints:** 26вҶ’- React 18+ with TypeScript 27вҶ’- Storybook as development environment 28вҶ’- External state management only (no useState/useReducer) 29вҶ’- Permitted hooks: `useRef`, `useSyncExternalStore`, `useMemo` 30вҶ’- Mature libraries only (8+ years of evolution) 31вҶ’- Preference for deterministic, testable architectures (State Machines) 32вҶ’ 33вҶ’--- 34вҶ’ 35вҶ’## 2. 318вҶ’ 319вҶ’#### Level 1: Strategic (10-12 Years) 320вҶ’ 321вҶ’**Purpose:** Capital planning, fleet lifecycle overview, overhaul clustering 322вҶ’ 323вҶ’**Visual Elements:** 324вҶ’- Heatmap grid: Rows = Train units, Columns = Quarters/Years 325вҶ’- Color intensity = Maintenance cost/hours 326вҶ’- Horizontal threshold lines at 400K/800K/1.2M km 327вҶ’- Major overhaul milestones as prominent blocks 328вҶ’- Fleet segmentation by type (Kinki Sharyo / Alstom) 329вҶ’ 330вҶ’#### Level 2: Tactical (1-3 Years) 331вҶ’ 332вҶ’**Purpose:** Workload balancing, capacity planning, campaign scheduling assignment indicators 349вҶ’- Dependency lines between related tasks 350вҶ’- "Today" vertical line (prominent red dotted) 351вҶ’- Mileage balance bars per train 352вҶ’ 353вҶ’#### Level 4: Execution (1-4 Weeks) 354вҶ’ 355вҶ’**Purpose:** Shift planning, bay assignment, real-time tracking 356вҶ’ 357вҶ’**Visual Elements:** 358вҶ’- Detailed task cards with task name, duration, assigned technicians, Frontend Architecture 498вҶ’ 499вҶ’### 5.1 Core Principles 500вҶ’ 501вҶ’1. **State Outside React**: All application state managed externally 502вҶ’2. **Deterministic Updates**: State transitions via finite state machines 503вҶ’3. **Immutable Data**: All state updates produce new references 504вҶ’4. **Render Performance**: React only handles DOM reconciliation 505вҶ’5. **Testability**: State logic unit-testable without React 506вҶ’ 507вҶ’### 5.2 Allowed React Hooks 508вҶ’ 509вҶ’| Hook | Purpose | Usage | 510вҶ’|------|---------|-------| 511вҶ’| `useRef` | DOM references, mutable values | Canvas refs, animation frames | 512вҶ’| `useSyncExternalStore` | Subscribe to external stores | State machine subscriptions | 513вҶ’| `useMemo` | Derived values from stable inputs | Computed selectors | 514вҶ’| Library hooks | Required by external libraries | deck.gl, XState, etc. | 515вҶ’ 516вҶ’### 5.3 Prohibited Patterns 517вҶ’ 518вҶ’```typescript 519вҶ’// вқҢ PROHIBITED 520вҶ’const [state, setState] = useState(); 521вҶ’const [state, dispatch] = useReducer(); 522вҶ’useEffect(() => { /* side effects */ }, []); 523вҶ’useCallback(() => {}, []); 524вҶ’ 525вҶ’// вң… ALLOWED 526вҶ’const canvasRef = useRef(null); 527вҶ’const state = useSyncExternalStore(store.subscribe, store.getSnapshot); 528вҶ’const derived = useMemo(() => computeExpensive(state), [state]); 529вҶ’``` 530вҶ’ 731вҶ’ "immer": "^10.0.0", 732вҶ’ 733вҶ’ "d3-scale": "^4.0.0", 734вҶ’ "d3-interpolate": "^3.0.0", 735вҶ’ "d3-ease": "^3.0.0", 736вҶ’ "d3-time": "^3.0.0", 737вҶ’ 738вҶ’ "gl-matrix": "^3.4.0", 739вҶ’ "rbush": "^3.0.0", 740вҶ’ 741вҶ’ "lucide-react": "^0.300.0" 742вҶ’ } 743вҶ’} 744вҶ’``` 745вҶ’ 746вҶ’### 7.3 Performance Targets 747вҶ’ 748вҶ’| Metric | Target | Measurement | 749вҶ’|--------|--------|-------------| 750вҶ’| Initial Load | < 2s | First Contentful Paint | 751вҶ’| Zoom Response | < 16ms | Input to visual feedback | 752вҶ’| Pan Response | < 16ms | Input to visual feedback | 753вҶ’| LOD Transition | < 200ms | Complete layer swap | 754вҶ’| Memory (idle) | < 100MB | Chrome DevTools | 755вҶ’| 60K Points Render | 60fps | Chrome Performance panel | 756вҶ’ 757вҶ’### 7.4 Key Implementation Tips 758вҶ’ 759вҶ’1. **During zoom gesture**: Use CSS transform for instant GPU-accelerated feedback 760вҶ’2. **After zoom settles** (debounced 150ms): Redraw canvas with new LOD 761вҶ’3. **LOD transitions**: Crossfade between layers over 200ms 762вҶ’4. **Row virtualization**: Render only visible rows + 5-row buffer 763вҶ’5. **Spatial indexing**: Use Quadtree/R-tree for O(log n) viewport queries 764вҶ’ 765вҶ’--- 766вҶ’ 767вҶ’## Appendix: Image Sources 768вҶ’ 769вҶ’All moodboard images sourced from official vendor websites: 770вҶ’- voestalpine: https://www.voestalpine.com/railway-systems/ 771вҶ’- ZEDAS: https://www.zedas.com/ 772вҶ’- Siemens: https://developer.siemens.com/railigent-x/ 773вҶ’- Alstom: https://www.alstom.com/ 774вҶ’- Prometheus Group: https://www.prometheusgroup.com/ 775вҶ’- Linear: https://linear.app/ 776вҶ’- Grafana: https://grafana.com/ 777вҶ’- DHTMLX: https://dhtmlx.com/ 778вҶ’- deck.gl: https://deck.gl/ 779вҶ’- eMaint: https://www.emaint.com/ 780вҶ’- Asana: https://asana.com/ 781вҶ’- Monday.com: https://monday.com/ 782вҶ’ 783вҶ’--- 784вҶ’ 785вҶ’*Document Version: 1.0* 786вҶ’*Last Updated: December file.content: # MMS UX, Design and Frontend Style Guide **Mileage Management System - Fractal Canvas Interface** **Version:** 1.0 **Date:** December 2025 --- ## Table of Contents 1. [Executive Summary](#1-executive-summary) 2. [Moodboard](#2-moodboard) 3. [UX Specifications](#3-ux-specifications) 4. [Design System](#4-design-system) 5. [Frontend Architecture](#5-frontend-architecture) 6. [Library Comparison Tables](#6-library-comparison-tables) 7. [Final Stack Recommendations](#7-final-stack-recommendations) --- ## 1. Executive Summary This document establishes the visual identity, interaction patterns, and technical architecture for the MMS Fractal Canvas interface. The system enables maintenance planners to navigate seamlessly from 12-year strategic views to shift-level execution through semantic zoomвҖ”similar to Google Maps but for time-based maintenance planning. **Core Constraints:** - React 18+ with TypeScript - Storybook as development environment - External state management only (no useState/useReducer) - Permitted hooks: `useRef`, `useSyncExternalStore`, `useMemo` - Mature libraries only (8+ years of evolution) - Preference for deterministic, testable architectures (State Machines) --- ## 2. Moodboard ### 2.1 Railway Fleet Monitoring Systems #### voestalpine zentrak - Fleet Condition Monitoring (Dark Theme) *Real-time fleet monitoring with ML-powered diagnostics* #### voestalpine zentrak - Alarming & Intervention *Proactive alerts and measurement data visualization* #### voestalpine zentrak - System Supervision *Geographic map with sensor connections and status display* --- ### 2.2 ZEDAS Asset Management #### Wheelset Analyser - Predictive Maintenance *Wheelset wear forecast with timeline visualization* #### Resource Manager - Personnel & Task Planning *Gantt-style resource scheduling interface* #### Invest Manager - Long-term Planning (30 Years) *Investment forecasting and scenario comparison* #### Staff Forecasting *Workforce planning analytics* --- ### 2.3 Siemens Railigent X #### Fleet Analytics Dashboard *Digital transformation for sustainable mobility* #### Maintenance Cost Reduction *15% cost reduction analytics* #### Availability Dashboard *100% availability tracking* --- ### 2.4 Alstom HealthHub #### Condition-Based Maintenance Dashboard *Fleet monitoring with KPIs - 100+ projects, 30% downtime reduction* #### Digital Depot Infographic *Fleet monitoring & management workflow* --- ### 2.5 Prometheus Group GWOS - Maintenance Planning #### Gantt Scheduler *Four-quadrant flexible Gantt architecture* #### Dashboard Overview *Real-time capacity and workload visualization* #### Order Planner *Work order management interface* #### Shift Updater *Resource allocation by shift* #### PM Manager - Preventive Maintenance *Long-term maintenance planning* --- ### 2.6 Modern Dashboard Design - Linear App (Dark Theme) #### Roadmap Timeline *Modern project timeline UI pattern* #### Cycle Analytics *Insights dashboard with KPIs* --- ### 2.7 Grafana - Time Series Dashboards (Dark Theme) #### Full Monitoring Dashboard *Multiple panel types with time-series visualization* #### Kubernetes Capacity *Resource utilization heatmaps* #### Alerting Interface *Alert management and status* --- ### 2.8 DHTMLX Gantt - Professional Gantt Charts #### Full Gantt View with Dependencies #### Resource Management View #### Critical Path Visualization #### Resource Load Diagram #### Theme Options (Including Dark) --- ### 2.9 deck.gl - WebGL Data Visualization #### Screen Grid Layer (Heatmap) *High-performance data density visualization* #### Hexagon Layer (3D Aggregation) #### Heatmap Layer --- ### 2.10 eMaint CMMS #### EAM Dashboard #### Asset Management #### Work Orders --- ### 2.11 Asana - Timeline Views #### Timeline View #### Gantt View --- ### 2.12 Monday.com #### Gantt Chart #### Progress Dashboard --- ### 2.13 Key Visual Themes Summary | Theme | Description | Primary Reference | |-------|-------------|-------------------| | **Industrial Precision** | Clean, technical aesthetic for control rooms | voestalpine zentrak, Grafana | | **Information Density** | Maximum data visibility without clutter | SNCF Fleet Dashboard, Linear | | **Temporal Navigation** | Time as primary navigation axis | Google Maps, DHTMLX Gantt | | **Status at a Glance** | Color-coded health indicators | Prometheus GWOS, Railigent X | | **Progressive Disclosure** | Details emerge on zoom, not click | Mapbox, deck.gl | | **Dark Theme Priority** | Reduced eye strain in control rooms | zentrak, Grafana, Linear | ### 2.14 Anti-Patterns to Avoid | вқҢ Avoid | вң… Prefer | |----------|----------| | 3D effects, gradients on Gantt bars | Flat, monochrome rectangles | | Pure black borders | Slightly darker tone of bar background | | Multiple navigation tabs/pages | Single continuous canvas | | Modal dialogs for details | Inline expansion on zoom | | Skeuomorphic design elements | Clean, functional minimalism | | Bright saturated colors | Muted professional palette | --- ## 3. UX Specifications ### 3.1 Semantic Zoom Architecture The interface operates as a continuous zoomable canvas where zoom level determines content granularity: ``` ZOOM LEVEL TIME SPAN CONTENT DENSITY RENDERING в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ Strategic (< 0.3x) в”Ӯ 10-12 years в”Ӯ Aggregated blocks в”Ӯ WebGL в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Mileage thresholds в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ Tactical (0.3-1.0x) в”Ӯ 1-3 years в”Ӯ Campaign bars в”Ӯ WebGL/Canvas в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Capacity heatmap в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ Operational (1-3x) в”Ӯ 1-6 months в”Ӯ Work orders в”Ӯ Canvas/SVG в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Resource lanes в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ Execution (> 3x) в”Ӯ 1-4 weeks в”Ӯ Task details в”Ӯ SVG/HTML в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Bay assignments в”Ӯ ``` ### 3.2 Navigation Patterns #### Primary Navigation (Zoom + Pan) | Action | Input | Result | |--------|-------|--------| | Pan horizontally | Drag / Arrow keys / Shift+Scroll | Move through time | | Pan vertically | Drag / Arrow keys | Move through train units | | Zoom in | Scroll up / Pinch out / `+` key | Increase temporal detail | | Zoom out | Scroll down / Pinch in / `-` key | Decrease temporal detail | | Reset view | `Home` key / Reset button | Return to default strategic view | | Jump to today | `T` key / Today button | Center on current date | ### 3.3 Content by Zoom Level #### Level 1: Strategic (10-12 Years) **Purpose:** Capital planning, fleet lifecycle overview, overhaul clustering **Visual Elements:** - Heatmap grid: Rows = Train units, Columns = Quarters/Years - Color intensity = Maintenance cost/hours - Horizontal threshold lines at 400K/800K/1.2M km - Major overhaul milestones as prominent blocks - Fleet segmentation by type (Kinki Sharyo / Alstom) #### Level 2: Tactical (1-3 Years) **Purpose:** Workload balancing, capacity planning, campaign scheduling **Visual Elements:** - Stacked bars showing PM types (PM1, PM2, PM3, Overhaul) - Depot capacity utilization as background heatmap - Resource allocation bands (man-hours available vs. required) - Budget period markers - Warning indicators for over-capacity periods #### Level 3: Operational (1-6 Months) **Purpose:** Work order management, resource assignment, conflict resolution **Visual Elements:** - Individual work order bars (DNA-like pattern) - Swimlanes per train unit - Resource assignment indicators - Dependency lines between related tasks - "Today" vertical line (prominent red dotted) - Mileage balance bars per train #### Level 4: Execution (1-4 Weeks) **Purpose:** Shift planning, bay assignment, real-time tracking **Visual Elements:** - Detailed task cards with task name, duration, assigned technicians, parts status - Depot bay grid overlay - Shift boundaries clearly marked - Real-time status badges ### 3.4 Layout Structure ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ NAVBAR [Zoom: 1.00x] [LOD] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [вҳ°] MMS Canvas [<< Today >>] [Search] [Filtersв–ј] [вҡҷ] [рҹ‘Ө] в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ TIMELINE HEADER (adaptive granularity) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ 2024 в”Ӯ 2025 в”Ӯ 2026 в”Ӯ 2027 в”Ӯ ... в”Ӯ or в”Ӯ Jan в”Ӯ Feb в”Ӯ Mar в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ SIDEBAR в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Train в”Ӯ MAIN CANVAS в”Ӯ в”Ӯ IDs в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (synced в”Ӯ [Strategic | Tactical | Operational | Execution] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ scroll) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Rendered via WebGL/Canvas/SVG в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Filters в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җв”Ӯ в”Ӯ Legend в”Ӯ в”ӮMinimap в”Ӯв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ [+][-] в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳв”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` --- ## 4. Design System ### 4.1 Color Palette #### Primary Colors (Dark Theme - Default) | Token | Hex | RGB | Usage | |-------|-----|-----|-------| | `--bg-primary` | `#0f172a` | 15, 23, 42 | Main background (slate-900) | | `--bg-secondary` | `#1e293b` | 30, 41, 59 | Cards, panels (slate-800) | | `--bg-tertiary` | `#334155` | 51, 65, 85 | Hover states (slate-700) | | `--border-default` | `#475569` | 71, 85, 105 | Borders (slate-600) | | `--text-primary` | `#f1f5f9` | 241, 245, 249 | Primary text (slate-100) | | `--text-secondary` | `#94a3b8` | 148, 163, 184 | Secondary text (slate-400) | | `--text-muted` | `#64748b` | 100, 116, 139 | Muted text (slate-500) | #### Semantic Colors (Status) | Token | Hex | Usage | Visual | |-------|-----|-------|--------| | `--status-healthy` | `#22c55e` | Available, complete, on-track | рҹҹў | | `--status-warning` | `#f59e0b` | Approaching threshold, scheduled | рҹҹЎ | | `--status-critical` | `#ef4444` | Overdue, exceeded, conflict | рҹ”ҙ | | `--status-info` | `#3b82f6` | In-progress, selected, active | рҹ”ө | | `--status-neutral` | `#6b7280` | Unavailable, historical | вҡ« | #### Maintenance Type Colors | Token | Hex | Maintenance Type | |-------|-----|------------------| | `--maint-pm1` | `#60a5fa` | PM1 - Light inspection (blue-400) | | `--maint-pm2` | `#a78bfa` | PM2 - Medium maintenance (violet-400) | | `--maint-pm3` | `#f472b6` | PM3 - Heavy maintenance (pink-400) | | `--maint-overhaul` | `#fb923c` | Overhaul (orange-400) | | `--maint-corrective` | `#f87171` | Corrective/Urgent (red-400) | #### Heatmap Gradient ``` Low utilization вҶ’ Medium вҶ’ High вҶ’ Over capacity #1e3a5f #f59e0b #dc2626 #7f1d1d ``` ### 4.2 Typography #### Font Stack ```css --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Consolas', monospace; ``` #### Type Scale | Token | Size | Weight | Usage | |-------|------|--------|-------| | `--text-xs` | 11px | 400 | Labels on Gantt bars | | `--text-sm` | 13px | 400 | Secondary info, timestamps | | `--text-base` | 14px | 400 | Body text, descriptions | | `--text-lg` | 16px | 500 | Section headers | | `--text-xl` | 20px | 600 | Panel titles | | `--text-2xl` | 24px | 700 | Page titles | | `--text-mono` | 12px | 400 | Train IDs, codes, numbers | ### 4.3 Component Specifications #### Gantt Bar Anatomy ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в•ӯ PM2-00456 вҡ пёҸ в”Ӯ вҶҗ Rounded top-left corner в”Ӯ 4.5h в”Ӯ Track 3 в”Ӯ 2 technicians в”Ӯ вҶҗ Info in single line в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ Height: 24px (operational), 16px (tactical), 8px (strategic) Corner radius: 4px top-left only Border: None (use 10% darker background for definition) ``` #### KPI Card Anatomy ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ Fleet Availability в”Ӯ вҶҗ Label (text-sm, text-secondary) в”Ӯ 94.2% в”Ӯ вҶҗ Value (text-2xl, text-primary) в”Ӯ в–І +1.2% vs last month в”Ӯ вҶҗ Delta (text-sm, status-healthy) в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### 4.4 Animation & Motion #### Timing Functions ```css --ease-out-expo: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); /* Primary for zoom */ --ease-out-cubic: cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1); /* Secondary transitions */ ``` #### Duration Tokens | Token | Duration | Usage | |-------|----------|-------| | `--duration-fast` | 100ms | Micro-interactions | | `--duration-normal` | 200ms | Standard transitions | | `--duration-slow` | 300ms | Complex animations | | `--duration-zoom` | 400ms | Zoom level transitions | --- ## 5. Frontend Architecture ### 5.1 Core Principles 1. **State Outside React**: All application state managed externally 2. **Deterministic Updates**: State transitions via finite state machines 3. **Immutable Data**: All state updates produce new references 4. **Render Performance**: React only handles DOM reconciliation 5. **Testability**: State logic unit-testable without React ### 5.2 Allowed React Hooks | Hook | Purpose | Usage | |------|---------|-------| | `useRef` | DOM references, mutable values | Canvas refs, animation frames | | `useSyncExternalStore` | Subscribe to external stores | State machine subscriptions | | `useMemo` | Derived values from stable inputs | Computed selectors | | Library hooks | Required by external libraries | deck.gl, XState, etc. | ### 5.3 Prohibited Patterns ```typescript // вқҢ PROHIBITED const [state, setState] = useState(); const [state, dispatch] = useReducer(); useEffect(() => { /* side effects */ }, []); useCallback(() => {}, []); // вң… ALLOWED const canvasRef = useRef(null); const state = useSyncExternalStore(store.subscribe, store.getSnapshot); const derived = useMemo(() => computeExpensive(state), [state]); ``` ### 5.4 State Architecture ``` в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ External Store Layer в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ ViewportMachine в”Ӯ в”Ӯ DataStore в”Ӯ в”Ӯ SelectionMachineв”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (XState) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (Normalized) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ (XState) в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - zoom в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - trains{} в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - selected[] в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - pan {x,y} в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - tasks{} в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - hovered в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - lod в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - resources{} в”Ӯ в”Ӯ - focused в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ Selector Functions в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ useSyncExternalStore() в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”¬в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ в”Ӯ React Components в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ ``` ### 5.5 Directory Structure ``` src/ в”ңв”Җв”Җ stores/ # External state management в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ machines/ # XState machine definitions в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ viewport.machine.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ selection.machine.ts в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ scheduler.machine.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ data/ # Normalized data stores в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ trains.store.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ selectors/ # Memoized derivations в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ visible-tasks.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ renderers/ # Canvas/WebGL rendering logic в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ webgl/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ strategic.renderer.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ canvas/ в”Ӯ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ operational.renderer.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ svg/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ execution.renderer.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ math/ # Pure mathematical utilities в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ interpolation.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ viewport.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ aggregation.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ interactions/ # Input handling в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ gesture-recognizer.ts в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ keyboard-handler.ts в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/ # React components (thin wrappers) в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Canvas/ в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җв”Җ Sidebar/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ Controls/ в”Ӯ в””в”Җв”Җ stories/ # Storybook stories в””в”Җв”Җ FractalCanvas.stories.tsx ``` --- ## 6. Library Comparison Tables ### 6.1 Rendering Libraries #### WebGL Libraries | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | 60K+ Points | React Integration | License | |---------|----------|-------------|-------------|-------------------|---------| | **deck.gl** | 9 years (2015) | ~300KB | вң… Excellent | `@deck.gl/react` | MIT | | **Three.js + R3F** | 15 years (2010) | ~150KB | вң… Good | react-three-fiber | MIT | | **PixiJS** | 12 years (2013) | ~200KB | вң… Good | @pixi/react | MIT | | **regl** | 8 years (2016) | ~80KB | вң… Excellent | Manual | MIT | #### Canvas 2D Libraries | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | Performance | License | |---------|----------|-------------|-------------|---------| | **Fabric.js** | 14 years (2011) | ~300KB | Good | MIT | | **Konva** | 10 years (2015) | ~150KB | Good | MIT | | **Native Canvas API** | 20+ years | 0KB | Excellent | N/A | #### Gantt-Specific Libraries | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | Features | License | |---------|----------|-------------|----------|---------| | **DHTMLX Gantt** | 15+ years | ~500KB | Enterprise | Commercial | | **Bryntum Gantt** | 10+ years | ~800KB | Enterprise | Commercial | | **frappe-gantt** | 8 years (2017) | ~40KB | Basic | MIT | ### 6.2 State Management Libraries #### State Machine Libraries (Preferred) | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | TypeScript | Devtools | License | |---------|----------|-------------|------------|----------|---------| | **XState v5** | 10 years (2015) | ~40KB | вң… Excellent | вң… Yes | MIT | | **Robot** | 6 years (2019) | ~3KB | вң… Good | вқҢ No | MIT | #### Redux-Based Libraries | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | TypeScript | Devtools | License | |---------|----------|-------------|------------|----------|---------| | **Redux + Redux Toolkit** | 10 years (2015) | ~15KB | вң… Excellent | вң… Yes | MIT | | **Rematch** | 7 years (2018) | ~5KB | вң… Good | вң… Redux | MIT | ### 6.3 Mathematics Libraries | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | Features | License | |---------|----------|-------------|----------|---------| | **d3-scale** | 14 years | ~15KB | Time/linear scales | BSD-3 | | **d3-interpolate** | 14 years | ~8KB | Smooth zoom | BSD-3 | | **d3-ease** | 14 years | ~3KB | Easing functions | BSD-3 | | **gl-matrix** | 13 years (2012) | ~30KB | Vector/Matrix ops | MIT | | **rbush** | 11 years (2014) | ~8KB | R-tree spatial index | MIT | ### 6.4 Interaction Libraries | Library | Maturity | Bundle Size | Touch Support | License | |---------|----------|-------------|---------------|---------| | **Hammer.js** | 13 years (2012) | ~20KB | вң… Excellent | MIT | | **Native Pointer Events** | 10+ years | 0KB | вң… Good | N/A | ### 6.5 Comparison Summary #### Rendering Stack Comparison | Approach | Strategic | Tactical | Operational | Execution | Complexity | |----------|-----------|----------|-------------|-----------|------------| | **All WebGL (deck.gl)** | вң… | вң… | вҡ пёҸ | вқҢ | High | | **Hybrid (WebGL + Canvas + SVG)** | вң… | вң… | вң… | вң… | Medium | | **All Canvas** | вң… | вң… | вҡ пёҸ | вҡ пёҸ | Medium | #### State Management Comparison | Approach | Predictability | Testability | DevTools | Maturity | |----------|----------------|-------------|----------|----------| | **XState (FSM)** | вң… Excellent | вң… Excellent | вң… Yes | 10 years | | **Redux Toolkit** | вң… Good | вң… Good | вң… Yes | 10 years | --- ## 7. Final Stack Recommendations ### 7.1 Recommended Technology Stack #### Rendering Layer | Layer | Technology | Justification | |-------|------------|---------------| | **Strategic (WebGL)** | deck.gl | Native LOD support, 100K+ points, React integration | | **Tactical (WebGL/Canvas)** | deck.gl + Canvas 2D | Transition layer | | **Operational (Canvas)** | Native Canvas 2D API | Performance + interactivity balance | | **Execution (SVG/HTML)** | Native SVG + React | Rich interactivity, accessibility | #### State Management | Concern | Technology | Justification | |---------|------------|---------------| | **View State** | XState v5 | Deterministic, visual devtools, serializable | | **Selection State** | XState v5 | Multi-select as finite states | | **Data Store** | Immer + normalizr pattern | Immutable updates, normalized entities | #### Mathematics | Concern | Technology | Justification | |---------|------------|---------------| | **Scales** | d3-scale | Industry standard | | **Interpolation** | d3-interpolate | Optimal zoom paths | | **Easing** | d3-ease | Standard functions | | **Spatial Index** | rbush | Mature R-tree | | **Matrix Ops** | gl-matrix | WebGL transforms | #### Interactions | Concern | Technology | Justification | |---------|------------|---------------| | **Gestures** | Native Pointer Events | Zero dependency, full control | | **Keyboard** | Native KeyboardEvent | Standard patterns | ### 7.2 Complete Dependency List ```json { "dependencies": { "@deck.gl/core": "^9.0.0", "@deck.gl/layers": "^9.0.0", "@deck.gl/react": "^9.0.0", "xstate": "^5.0.0", "@xstate/react": "^4.0.0", "immer": "^10.0.0", "d3-scale": "^4.0.0", "d3-interpolate": "^3.0.0", "d3-ease": "^3.0.0", "d3-time": "^3.0.0", "gl-matrix": "^3.4.0", "rbush": "^3.0.0", "lucide-react": "^0.300.0" } } ``` ### 7.3 Performance Targets | Metric | Target | Measurement | |--------|--------|-------------| | Initial Load | < 2s | First Contentful Paint | | Zoom Response | < 16ms | Input to visual feedback | | Pan Response | < 16ms | Input to visual feedback | | LOD Transition | < 200ms | Complete layer swap | | Memory (idle) | < 100MB | Chrome DevTools | | 60K Points Render | 60fps | Chrome Performance panel | ### 7.4 Key Implementation Tips 1. **During zoom gesture**: Use CSS transform for instant GPU-accelerated feedback 2. **After zoom settles** (debounced 150ms): Redraw canvas with new LOD 3. **LOD transitions**: Crossfade between layers over 200ms 4. **Row virtualization**: Render only visible rows + 5-row buffer 5. **Spatial indexing**: Use Quadtree/R-tree for O(log n) viewport queries --- ## Appendix: Image Sources All moodboard images sourced from official vendor websites: - voestalpine: https://www.voestalpine.com/railway-systems/ - ZEDAS: https://www.zedas.com/ - Siemens: https://developer.siemens.com/railigent-x/ - Alstom: https://www.alstom.com/ - Prometheus Group: https://www.prometheusgroup.com/ - Linear: https://linear.app/ - Grafana: https://grafana.com/ - DHTMLX: https://dhtmlx.com/ - deck.gl: https://deck.gl/ - eMaint: https://www.emaint.com/ - Asana: https://asana.com/ - Monday.com: https://monday.com/ --- *Document Version: 1.0* *Last Updated: December 2025* *Status: Ready for Implementation*

content.content:
1вҶ’# Visual Design Specifications
     2вҶ’
     3вҶ’This directory contains the **Visual Reference Images** for the Metro Integrated Planning System.
     4вҶ’
     5вҶ’> **Important:** These images are AI-generated and represent the VISION, not pixel-perfect specifications.
     6вҶ’> They capture the essence of what we're building: a "Single Pane of Glass" with semantic zoom.
     7вҶ’
     8вҶ’---
     9вҶ’
    10вҶ’## Core Design Vision
    11вҶ’
    12вҶ’### The "80% Cognitive Load Reduction" Goal
    13вҶ’
    14вҶ’The system aims to reduce analysis and planning overhead by 80%+ through:
    15вҶ’
    16вҶ’| Principle                   | Description                                | Implementation                  |
    17вҶ’|-----------------------------|--------------------------------------------|---------------------------------|
    18вҶ’| **Single Pane of Glass**    | Everything in one view, no page navigation | Pan/zoom instead of tabs        |
    19вҶ’| **Semantic Zoom**           | Context changes with zoom level            | 3 LOD layers (Macro/Meso/Micro) |
    20вҶ’| **Direct Manipulation**     | Drag to reschedule, not forms              | Future: drag-and-drop tasks     |
    21вҶ’| **Game-like Visualization** | WebGL beyond standard charts               | R3F with custom shaders         |
    22вҶ’
    23вҶ’### Design Inspirations
    24вҶ’
    25вҶ’- **Google Earth/Maps:** Seamless zoom from planet to street
    26вҶ’- **Strategy Games:** Information density that doesn't overwhelm (Factorio, Cities Skylines)
    27вҶ’- **Financial Terminals:** Dense data, clear hierarchy (Bloomberg Terminal)
    28вҶ’
    29вҶ’---
    30вҶ’
    31вҶ’## Screen Reference Analysis
    32вҶ’
    33вҶ’### screen-1.png: Simulation Setup
    34вҶ’
    35вҶ’![Simulation Setup](screen-1.png)
    36вҶ’
    37вҶ’**What it shows:**
    38вҶ’- Maintenance Heatmap in background
    39вҶ’- Modal: "Simulation Setup: Scenario A"
    40вҶ’- Constraint sliders (Labor Availability: 50%)
    41вҶ’- Date range selector
    42вҶ’- Infrastructure toggle (Maintenance Pit Status)
    43вҶ’- "Run Solver (Est. 45s)" button
    44вҶ’
    45вҶ’**Design Intent:**
    46вҶ’- What-If scenarios start with constraint adjustment
    47вҶ’- Solver is async with time estimate
    48вҶ’- Simple controls for complex simulations
    49вҶ’
    50вҶ’**Implementation:** Future feature (Scenario Mode)
    51вҶ’
    52вҶ’---
    53вҶ’
    54вҶ’### screen-2.png: Full System with Zoom Popup
    55вҶ’
    56вҶ’![Full System](screen-2.png)
    57вҶ’
    58вҶ’**What it shows:**
    59вҶ’- Header KPIs: "Fleet Avail: 98%", "Annual Budget: On Track"
    60вҶ’- Maintenance Heatmap (2021-2022+)
    61вҶ’- Legend: Routine maintenance, Mid-life overhauls, Capacity bottlenecks
    62вҶ’- Zoom popup: "Zoom in 4 weeks" detail view
    63вҶ’- Tasks with durations: "Brake Rev. T104 (8h)", "Wheel Lathe T112 (4h)"
    64вҶ’- Dependency arrows between tasks
    65вҶ’- Time Scrubber at bottom
    66вҶ’
    67вҶ’**Design Intent:**
    68вҶ’- Global KPIs always visible
    69вҶ’- Click-to-zoom for detail exploration
    70вҶ’- Dependencies are visual, not hidden in data
    71вҶ’
    72вҶ’**Implementation:**
    73вҶ’- Header: `apps/canvas/src/components/AppNavbar.tsx` (future)
    74вҶ’- Zoom popup: Click handler вҶ’ animated zoom transition
    75вҶ’- Time Scrubber: `apps/canvas/src/components/TimeScrubber.tsx` (future)
    76вҶ’
    77вҶ’---
    78вҶ’
    79вҶ’### screen-3.jpg: Multi-Scale View (All 3 LODs)
    80вҶ’
    81вҶ’![Multi-Scale View](screen-3.jpg)
    82вҶ’
    83вҶ’**What it shows:**
    84вҶ’
    85вҶ’| LOD Level | Time Scale | Visualization              | Planning Horizon |
    86вҶ’|-----------|------------|----------------------------|------------------|
    87вҶ’| **Macro** | 12 years   | Heatmap (density clusters) | Strategic        |
    88вҶ’| **Meso**  | 2 years    | DNA strips (task blocks)   | Tactical         |
    89вҶ’| **Micro** | 4 weeks    | Detailed Gantt (cards)     | Operational      |
    90вҶ’
    91вҶ’- Task tooltip: "Duration: 8h | Resources: 2 Techs, Pit 3 | Cost: $1200"
    92вҶ’- Time Scrubber spanning all views
    93вҶ’
    94вҶ’**Design Intent:**
    95вҶ’- Same data, different aggregations per zoom level
    96вҶ’- Each LOD answers different planning questions
    97вҶ’- Seamless transitions (no loading states)
    98вҶ’
    99вҶ’**Implementation:**
   100вҶ’- MacroLayer: `apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MacroLayer.tsx`
   101вҶ’- MesoLayer: `apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MesoLayer.tsx`
   102вҶ’- MicroLayer: `apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MicroLayer.tsx`
   103вҶ’
   104вҶ’---
   105вҶ’
   106вҶ’### screen-4.png: Campaign View with Conflict Alert
   107вҶ’
   108вҶ’![Campaign View](screen-4.png)
   109вҶ’
   110вҶ’**What it shows:**
   111вҶ’- All 3 LOD views stacked
   112вҶ’- Complex dependency arrows in Micro view
   113вҶ’- Task grouping: "Task Group: Bogie Overhaul Campaign | T145, T146, T147"
   114вҶ’- Resource detail: "8 Techs, Pit 1 & 2, Lift Crane"
   115вҶ’- **Conflict Alert:** "Overlapping with Signaling Upgrade"
   116вҶ’
   117вҶ’**Design Intent:**
   118вҶ’- Tasks can be grouped into "Campaigns" (related work)
   119вҶ’- Conflicts are explicit alerts, not just visual indicators
   120вҶ’- Resources include equipment (Lift Crane), not just man-hours
   121вҶ’
   122вҶ’**Data Implications:**
   123вҶ’- Need `Campaign` entity grouping related tasks
   124вҶ’- Need `Equipment` dimension (Pit, Lift Crane, Wheel Lathe)
   125вҶ’- Conflict detection must span multiple constraint types
   126вҶ’
   127вҶ’---
   128вҶ’
   129вҶ’### screen-5.png: Meso View with Capacity Chart
   130вҶ’
   131вҶ’![Capacity Chart](screen-5.png)
   132вҶ’
   133вҶ’**What it shows:**
   134вҶ’- Train IDs (T001-T050) on Y axis
   135вҶ’- 2028-2029 timeline on X axis
   136вҶ’- Diagonal task pattern (staggered scheduling)
   137вҶ’- **Capacity Utilization Chart at bottom:**
   138вҶ’  - Mechanical work (blue bars)
   139вҶ’  - Electrical work (yellow bars)
   140вҶ’  - Capacity Limit line
   141вҶ’  - Utilization over time
   142вҶ’
   143вҶ’**Design Intent:**
   144вҶ’- Diagonal pattern = "Equalizing" (Tokyo Metro methodology)
   145вҶ’- Capacity split by work type, not just total
   146вҶ’- Visual correlation between schedule and capacity
   147вҶ’
   148вҶ’**Data Implications:**
   149вҶ’- Tasks need `workType: "mechanical" | "electrical"` attribute
   150вҶ’- `FactResourceUsage` must track by type
   151вҶ’- Capacity chart component synced with main timeline
   152вҶ’
   153вҶ’**Implementation:**
   154вҶ’- Capacity Chart: `apps/canvas/src/components/CapacityChart.tsx` (future)
   155вҶ’
   156вҶ’---
   157вҶ’
   158вҶ’### screen-6.png: Micro View with Pit Occupancy
   159вҶ’
   160вҶ’![Pit Occupancy](screen-6.png)
   161вҶ’
   162вҶ’**What it shows:**
   163вҶ’- Header: "Fleet Avail: 99%", "Conflict Alerts: 0"
   164вҶ’- Zoom Level: Micro (4 Weeks)
   165вҶ’- Train rows with tasks and dependencies
   166вҶ’- **Pit Occupancy Panel:**
   167вҶ’  - Pit 1, Pit 2, Pit 3, Wash Bay rows
   168вҶ’  - Tasks shown in allocated resource
   169вҶ’  - **Red conflict indicator** on overlapping pit assignment
   170вҶ’- Time scale selector: 1 | 2 | 4 | 6 Weeks
   171вҶ’
   172вҶ’**Design Intent:**
   173вҶ’- Pit allocation is first-class visualization
   174вҶ’- Conflicts visible at resource level
   175вҶ’- Flexible time window for operational planning
   176вҶ’
   177вҶ’**Data Implications:**

   187вҶ’### screen-7.png: Scenario Diff View

   215вҶ’## Technical Requirements by Layer
   216вҶ’
   217вҶ’### MacroLayer (zoom < 0.5x)
   218вҶ’

   220вҶ’

   222вҶ’

   229вҶ’**Implementation:** `apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MacroLayer.tsx`
   230вҶ’

   232вҶ’
   233вҶ’### MesoLayer (0.5x вүӨ zoom вүӨ 2x)
   234вҶ’
   235вҶ’**Purpose:** Tactical 2-5 year planning
   236вҶ’
   237вҶ’**Visual:** DNA-like diagonal strips of task blocks
   238вҶ’
   239вҶ’**Technical:**
   240вҶ’- `InstancedMesh` with up to 60,000 instances
   241вҶ’- Colors via `InstancedBufferAttribute`
   242вҶ’- Spatial Hash Grid for hover detection
   243вҶ’- Alternating row backgrounds
   244вҶ’
   245вҶ’**Implementation:** `apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MesoLayer.tsx`
   246вҶ’
   247вҶ’---
   248вҶ’
   249вҶ’### MicroLayer (zoom > 2x)
   250вҶ’
   251вҶ’**Purpose:** Operational 4-8 week scheduling
   252вҶ’
   253вҶ’**Visual:** Detailed task cards with labels, grid, dependencies
   254вҶ’
   255вҶ’**Technical:**
   256вҶ’- `<Html>` component from drei with `transform`
   257вҶ’- `Line2` (Fat Lines) for dependency arrows
   258вҶ’- BlueprintJS styling (Card, Tag, Intent)
   259вҶ’- Accessibility: tabIndex, ARIA labels
   260вҶ’
   261вҶ’**Implementation:** `apps/canvas/src/canvas/layers/MicroLayer.tsx`
   262вҶ’
   263вҶ’---
   264вҶ’
   265вҶ’## Color Palette
   266вҶ’
   267вҶ’### Task Colors
   268вҶ’
   269вҶ’| Type | Color | Hex | Usage |
   270вҶ’|------|-------|-----|-------|
   271вҶ’| Routine/A-Check | Deep Blue | `#3b82f6` | Standard maintenance |
   272вҶ’| Overhaul/D-Check | Orange | `#f59e0b` | Major overhauls |
   273вҶ’| Inspection | Gray | `#6b7280` | Quick inspections |
   274вҶ’
   275вҶ’### Semantic Colors
   276вҶ’
   277вҶ’| Meaning | Color | Hex | BlueprintJS Intent |
   278вҶ’|---------|-------|-----|-------------------|
   279вҶ’| Conflict/Alert | Red | `#ef4444` | Intent.DANGER |
   280вҶ’| Warning | Yellow | `#eab308` | Intent.WARNING |
   281вҶ’| Success/Resolved | Green | `#22c55e` | Intent.SUCCESS |
   282вҶ’| Neutral | Blue | `#3b82f6` | Intent.PRIMARY |
   283вҶ’
   284вҶ’### UI Colors
   285вҶ’
   286вҶ’| Element | Color | Hex |
   287вҶ’|---------|-------|-----|
   288вҶ’| Background | Soft gray | `#f4f4f5` (zinc-100) |
   289вҶ’| Card background | White | `#ffffff` |
   290вҶ’| Grid lines | Light gray | `#e5e7eb` |
   291вҶ’| Dependency arrows | Slate | `#64748b` |
   292вҶ’
   293вҶ’### Heatmap Gradient
   294вҶ’
   295вҶ’```
   296вҶ’Low density    вҶ’    Medium    вҶ’    High density
   297вҶ’#fef3c7 (yellow)  #fb923c (orange)  #dc2626 (red)
   298вҶ’```
   299вҶ’
   300вҶ’---
   301вҶ’
   302вҶ’## Design Principles
   303вҶ’
   304вҶ’### 1. Progressive Disclosure via Zoom
   305вҶ’
   306вҶ’Don't show everything at once. Zoom level determines information density.
   307вҶ’
   308вҶ’| Zoom | Shows | Hides |
   309вҶ’|------|-------|-------|
   310вҶ’| Macro | Density patterns, hotspots | Individual tasks |

   312вҶ’| Micro | Full details, dependencies | Big picture |
   313вҶ’
   314вҶ’### 2. Spatial Memory over Navigation
   315вҶ’
   316вҶ’Users learn where things are. No page switches, just pan/zoom.
   317вҶ’
   318вҶ’- Train T001 is always at the top
   319вҶ’- 2025 is always to the left of 2026
   320вҶ’- Context preserved during exploration
   321вҶ’
   322вҶ’### 3. Conflicts are First-Class Citizens
   323вҶ’
   324вҶ’Not hidden in tooltips or logs. Explicit visual treatment.
   325вҶ’
   326вҶ’- Red indicators at task level
   327вҶ’- Red hatched zones for conflict areas
   328вҶ’- Alert badges in header
   329вҶ’- Conflict explanation in tooltips
   330вҶ’
   331вҶ’### 4. Resources are Visible
   332вҶ’
   333вҶ’Pit occupancy shown, not just calculated internally.
   334вҶ’
   335вҶ’- Capacity charts alongside schedule
   336вҶ’- Equipment tracking (Wheel Lathe, Lift Crane)
   337вҶ’- Utilization percentages in real-time
   338вҶ’
   339вҶ’### 5. Scenarios are Comparable
   340вҶ’
   341вҶ’Side-by-side or overlay comparison for What-If analysis.
   342вҶ’
   343вҶ’- Diff view shows what changed
   344вҶ’- Metrics delta (cost, conflicts, utilization)
   345вҶ’- Visual path from problem вҶ’ solution
   346вҶ’
   347вҶ’---
   348вҶ’
   349вҶ’## Implementation Status
   350вҶ’
   351вҶ’### Completed (POC Validated)
   352вҶ’
   353вҶ’- [x] Semantic zoom concept (reference/semantic-zoom-poc.html)
   354вҶ’- [x] 3 LOD layers with smooth transitions
   355вҶ’- [x] Pan/zoom navigation
   356вҶ’- [x] Sidebar sync with canvas

   359вҶ’
   360вҶ’### In Progress (Production App)
   361вҶ’
   362вҶ’- [x] F101: Vite + React 18 + BlueprintJS skeleton
   363вҶ’- [x] F102: R3F Canvas + OrthographicCamera
   364вҶ’- [x] F103: BlueprintJS layout (Navbar, Card sidebar)
   365вҶ’- [ ] F104: Data types and mock generator вҶҗ **NEXT**
   366вҶ’- [ ] F105-F117: Remaining features
   367вҶ’
   368вҶ’### Future Features (Post-Demo)
   369вҶ’

   377вҶ’---
   378вҶ’
   379вҶ’## Open Questions
   380вҶ’
   381вҶ’1. **Dependency arrows at Meso level?** May clutter, but shows relationships
   382вҶ’2. **Capacity chart position?** Bottom (like screen-5) or collapsible panel?
